title: Candidate Attrition Prediction Tools: 2026 Platform Comparison
description: Comprehensive review of 2026 Candidate Attrition Prediction Tools, including features, pricing, and platform comparisons. Helping staffing agencies predict candidate turnover risks. Learn more about features and pricing to find the best solution! Professional reviews to guide your decision.
content:
Candidate Attrition Prediction Overview

Attrition prediction is an important component of staffing agency risk management. Staffing agencies need to predict candidate turnover probability, identify retention risks, develop retention strategies. Candidate attrition prediction tools help agencies achieve predictive analysis, risk identification, retention recommendations.

The core value of candidate attrition prediction tools lies in improving retention rate by 30%, decreasing turnover losses by 40%, enhancing prediction accuracy by 50%. According to industry research data, staffing agencies adopting attrition prediction tools average turnover rate decreased by 25%, retention cost saved by 35%, prediction accuracy improved by 20%.

Attrition Prediction Platform Reviews

Pymetrics Attrition Prediction

Pymetrics provides cognitive-based attrition prediction. Prediction features analyze candidate cognitive traits, predict turnover probability. Risk identification features identify candidate retention risk factors. Retention recommendations features provide personalized retention strategies.

Pricing per assessment approximately 50-100 USD. Customer feedback notes prediction accuracy high, cognitive-based approach scientific.

HireVue Attrition Prediction

HireVue provides interview-based attrition prediction. Prediction features analyze interview video data, predict turnover probability. Risk identification features identify retention risk signals. Retention recommendations features provide retention strategy suggestions.

Pricing per month 500-2000 USD. Customer feedback notes video analysis accurate, interview data comprehensive.

Harver Attrition Prediction

Harver provides AI-driven attrition prediction. Prediction features analyze assessment data, predict turnover probability. Risk identification features identify retention risk factors. Retention recommendations features provide AI-generated retention strategies.

Pricing annual contract above 10,000 USD. Customer feedback notes AI prediction advanced, comprehensive features.

Attrition Prediction Platform Comparison

PlatformMarket PositionPricingPrediction AccuracyRisk IdentificationRetention Recommendations
PymetricsCognitive-based50-100 USD/assessmentExcellentExcellentGood
HireVueInterview-based500-2000 USD/monthGoodGoodExcellent
HarverAI-drivenAbove 10,000 USD/yearExcellentExcellentExcellent

2026 Attrition Prediction Trends

Attrition prediction market shows development trends:

AI prediction accuracy improves. AI algorithms optimize prediction models, accuracy will exceed 85%, prediction quality significantly improves.

Multi-dimensional prediction expands. Prediction will expand to multiple dimensions including cognitive traits, personality, work history and other factors.

Real-time prediction enhances. Prediction will shift from periodic to real-time, continuously monitoring candidate risk signals.

Retention recommendation intelligence enhances. Retention recommendations will become increasingly personalized and actionable.

Selection Recommendations

Staffing agencies selecting candidate attrition prediction tools should focus on: prediction accuracy improves risk identification; risk identification features identify retention risk factors; retention recommendations support retention strategies; integration connects recruitment platforms; cost structure matches agency prediction volume.
author: Attrition Prediction Research Institute
